name: FOLVITE TAB
description: Dietary supplement containing folic acid used to treat and prevent folic acid deficiency anemia, supporting red blood cell formation and fetal development during pregnancy.
uses: Treatment and prevention of folic acid deficiency anemia
Support during breastfeeding and post-surgery recovery
Prevention of neural tube birth defects
dosage: As directed by physician; preferably taken one hour before meals; typically once daily.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place. Keep out of reach of children and pets.

name: FOLVITE ACTIVE 1*15TAB
description: Dietary supplement containing folic acid used to treat and prevent folic acid deficiency anemia, supporting red blood cell formation and fetal development during pregnancy.
uses: Treatment and prevention of folic acid deficiency anemia
Support during breastfeeding and post-surgery recovery
Prevention of neural tube birth defects
dosage: As directed by physician; preferably taken one hour before meals; typically once daily.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place. Keep out of reach of children and pets.

name: FEFORON ZXT 1*10
description: Hematinics supplement containing ferrous ascorbate, zinc sulphate, vitamin B12, and folic acid for blood health support.

name: OROFER XT DROP 1*15ML
description: Iron supplement used for the prevention and treatment of iron deficiency anaemia in children and adults.
dosage: Take as directed by your doctor.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place. Protect from light. Keep out of reach of children.

name: DEXORANGE  CAP
description: A hematinic supplement used to prevent and treat anaemia caused by deficiencies of iron, folic acid, and vitamin B12.
uses: Nutritional supplementation during pregnancy and breastfeeding
dosage: Take as advised by your doctor using a dropper, spoon, or measuring cup.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature away from direct light. Keep out of reach of children and pets.

name: DEXORANGE SYP
description: A hematinic supplement used to prevent and treat anaemia caused by deficiencies of iron, folic acid, and vitamin B12.
uses: Nutritional supplementation during pregnancy and breastfeeding
dosage: Take as advised by your doctor using a dropper, spoon, or measuring cup.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature away from direct light. Keep out of reach of children and pets.

name: FOLDIVIT 5MG TAB
description: Dietary supplement containing folic acid used to treat and prevent folic acid deficiency.
uses: Treatment and prevention of folic acid deficiency
dosage: As directed by physician, typically once daily.

name: NUROKIND PLUS CAP.
description: A supplement often prescribed to treat nerve-related problems such as diabetic nerve pain and alcohol-related nerve damage. Contains B vitamins and alpha-lipoic acid for nerve health support.
dosage: As directed by doctor; take orally with water at fixed times.
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C in a clean and dry place, protected from direct sunlight, moisture and heat.

name: MEGANEURON-OD 1*10
description: A nutritional supplement containing mecobalamin, alpha-lipoic acid, benfotiamine, pyridoxine, biotin and folic acid used to address diabetic nerve damage complications.
dosage: Take as directed by your doctor, preferably at a fixed time.

name: MEGANEURON PG 1*10
description: Used to treat diabetic neuropathy and nerve pain from various causes including alcohol-induced neuropathy and vitamin deficiency.
dosage: Take as a whole with sufficient water, exactly as prescribed by your doctor.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place away from direct sunlight.

name: FERIUM XT TAB 1*15
description: A nutritional supplement containing iron and folic acid for treating iron and folic acid deficiency and anaemia.
uses: Iron and folic acid deficiency treatment
Nutritional supplement during pregnancy and breastfeeding
dosage: Take as advised by your doctor, preferably one hour before meals; avoid tea or coffee with intake.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place, keep out of reach of children and pets.

name: FEFOL Z CAP
description: Nutritional supplement containing folic acid, iron and zinc that treats anaemia caused by iron and folic acid deficiency.
uses: Prevention of iron, folic acid, and zinc deficiencies during pregnancy and breastfeeding
dosage: Take as directed by doctor; consume whole with water.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place. Keep away from children.
